text: FSx for Lustre @ rostsncantio @ s * Metadata stored on Metadata Targets (MST) * Objects are stored on called object storage targets (OSTs) (1.17TiB) e Baseline performance based on size e Size - min 1.2TiB then increments of 2.4TiB e For Scratch - Base 200 MB/s per TiB of storage * Persistent offers 50MB/s , 100MB/s and 200 MB/s per TiB of storage e Burst up to 1,300 MB/s per TiB (Credit System)
